topic.description: The documents discuss various legislative acts aimed at extending emergency unemployment compensation benefits for eligible individuals during specified periods.

topic.name: Missing Persons Legislation
topic.description: Legislation focused on the establishment and enhancement of databases and systems for tracking missing persons and unidentified remains.

1: Authorizes the Attorney General to maintain public databases containing missing persons records and unidentified remains cases.

4: Authorizes the Department of Justice to maintain public databases, known as the National Missing and Unidentified Persons System (NamUs), of missing persons and unidentified remains.

6: Authorizes the Attorney General to maintain public databases, known as the National Missing and Unidentified Persons System or NamUs, to contain missing persons records and unidentified remains cases.

7: Authorizes the Attorney General to maintain public databases, known as the National Missing and Unidentified Persons System or NamUs, to contain missing persons records and unidentified remains cases.
